nl: The University of Edinburgh is located in the United Kingdom.
Michael was born in Yorkshire and is the son of a general practitioner.
gold_fol: BornIn(michael, yorkshire) & exists x.(SonOf(michael, x) & GeneralPractitioner(x))

nl: Diseases that are leukemia are blood cancers.
All Ferraris are sports cars.
Inception is a sci-fi movie.
Mary can get from New Haven to New York either by train or by car.
Everyone who knows breadth-first search knows how to use a queue.
When Olivia sleeps, she prefers a cool temperature.
gold_fol: all x.(Sleep(olivia, x) -> Prefer(olivia, coolTemperature, x))

nl: Nancy teaches students.
Sam works on a project.
Easy Leetcode problems do not have an AC rate lower than 20%.
People in the tech company who have high energy and are impulsive don't like surprises.
gold_fol: all x.((InThisTechCompany(x) & Have(x, highEnergy) & Impulsive(x)) -> -Like(x, surprise))

nl: Beasts of Prey is about a creature known as the Shetani.
The lead singer of Imagine Dragons is Dan.
Either Mary goes from New Haven to New York by train or by car.
If Thor is happy, the Hulk is angry.
If Sam uses a Mac, he will play a song.
gold_fol: exists x.((Use(sam, mac) & Song(x)) -> Play(sam, x))

nl: Every car has wheels that are black and round.
gold_fol: all x.(Car(x) -> exists y.((Wheel(y) & HasWheel(x, y)) & (Black(y) & Round(y))))

nl: There are at least two distinct bears in the zoo.
gold_fol: exists x.(exists y.((Bear(x) & Bear(y)) & ((In(x, zoo) & In(y, zoo)) & -(x = y))))

nl: No person is both mortal and immortal.
An integer is even iff it is not odd.
Every student who takes a course is taught by a teacher of that course.
gold_fol: all x.(Student(x) -> exists y.(Course(y) & Takes(x, y) & exists z.(Teacher(z) & TeachesCourse(z, y) & Teaches(z, x))))

nl: (P0376) For all x and y, if y is a meal popular at a party, y is delicious.
gold_fol: all x.(all y.((Meal(y) & PopularAt(y, party)) -> Delicious(y)))

nl: (P0615) Guam sent an athlete to the Calgary Winter Olympics.
(P1296) Neofonie announced WeTab.
